Document routes: POST /indexes/{uid}/documents, GET /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id}, etc.\n//!\n//! Implements the write path from plan §2: hash primary key, inject _miroir_shard,\n//! fan out to RG × RF nodes, per-group quorum.\n\nuse axum::extract::{Path, State};\nuse axum::http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode};\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\nuse miroir_core::router;\nuse miroir_core::topology::NodeId;\n\npub fn router() -> Router {\n    Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n        .route(\"/:uid/documents\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n        .route(\"/:uid/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document).delete(delete_document))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents\n///\n/// Write path implementation per plan §2:\n/// 1. Extract primary key for each document\n/// 2. For each document: shard_id = hash(pk) % S\n/// 3. Inject _miroir_shard field\n/// 4. Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n/// 5. Apply per-group quorum\n/// 6. Return task ID with X-Miroir-Degraded if needed\nasync fn post_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let index_uid = uid;\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get primary key for this index\n    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &topology, &index_uid).await?;\n\n    // Parse documents array\n    let documents = body\n        .get(\"documents\")\n        .and_then(|d| d.as_array())\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"missing 'documents' field\"))?;\n\n    if documents.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"documents array is empty\"));\n    }\n\n    // Process each document: compute shard, inject _miroir_shard, group by target nodes\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let mut documents_by_shard: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for doc in documents {\n        let doc_obj = doc.as_object().ok_or_else(|| {\n            ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"document must be an object\")\n        })?;\n\n        // Extract primary key value\n        let pk_value = doc_obj.get(&primary_key).ok_or_else(|| {\n            ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\n                \"document missing primary key field '{}'\",\n                primary_key\n            ))\n        })?;\n\n        let pk_str = pk_value.as_str().ok_or_else(|| {\n            ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\n                \"primary key '{}' must be a string\",\n                primary_key\n            ))\n        })?;\n\n        // Compute shard ID\n        let shard_id = router::shard_for_key(pk_str, shard_count);\n\n        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n        let mut doc_with_shard = doc_obj.clone();\n        doc_with_shard.insert(\n            \"_miroir_shard\".to_string(),\n            Value::Number(shard_id.into()),\n        );\n\n        documents_by_shard\n            .entry(shard_id)\n            .or_default()\n            .push(Value::Object(doc_with_shard));\n    }\n\n    // Group documents by target node set (for batching)\n    let mut node_batches: HashMap<Vec<NodeId>, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for (shard_id, docs) in &documents_by_shard {\n        let target_nodes = router::write_targets(*shard_id, &topology);\n\n        node_batches\n            .entry(target_nodes)\n            .or_default()\n            .extend(docs.clone());\n    }\n\n    // Send batches to nodes in parallel and track quorum\n    let mut task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n    let mut degraded_groups: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let per_group_quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    for (target_nodes, batch_docs) in &node_batches {\n        // Group target nodes by replica group\n        let mut group_targets: HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeId>> = HashMap::new();\n        for node_id in target_nodes {\n            if let Some(node) = topology.node(node_id) {\n                group_targets\n                    .entry(node.replica_group)\n                    .or_default()\n                    .push(node_id.clone());\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Track per-group success\n        let mut groups_with_quorum = 0;\n        let mut total_groups = group_targets.len();\n\n        for (group_id, nodes) in &group_targets {\n            let responses = state\n                .client\n                .send_to_many(\n                    &topology,\n                    nodes,\n                    \"POST\",\n                    &format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index_uid),\n                    Some(\n                        serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"documents\": batch_docs }))\n                            .unwrap()\n                            .as_slice(),\n                    ),\n                    &[],\n                )\n                .await;\n\n            let mut successful_acks = 0;\n            for response in &responses {\n                if let Ok(resp) = response {\n                    if resp.status >= 200 && resp.status < 300 {\n                        successful_acks += 1;\n\n                        // Extract task UID from response\n                        if let Some(task_uid) = resp.body.get(\"taskUid\").and_then(|t| t.as_u64()) {\n                            task_uids.insert(resp.node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Check per-group quorum\n            if successful_acks >= per_group_quorum {\n                groups_with_quorum += 1;\n            } else {\n                degraded_groups.push(*group_id);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Check if at least one group met quorum\n        if groups_with_quorum == 0 {\n            // No group met quorum - track failed shards\n            for (shard_id, _) in documents_by_shard.iter() {\n                failed_shards.push(*shard_id);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Return error if no group met quorum for any shard\n    if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(failed_shards[0]));\n    }\n\n    // Generate Miroir task response\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": 0, // TODO: implement task registry\n        \"indexUid\": index_uid,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        \"details\": {\n            \"receivedDocuments\": documents.len(),\n            \"providedIds\": 0,\n        }\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id}\n///\n/// Get a single document by ID. Routes to any replica of the owning shard.\nasync fn get_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((uid, _id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let index_uid = uid;\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // TODO: Implement get by ID\n    // 1. Hash the document ID to get shard\n    // 2. Find any replica node for that shard\n    // 3. Forward request to that node\n    // 4. Strip _miroir_shard from response\n\n    Err((\n        StatusCode::NOT_IMPLEMENTED,\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"Not implemented\", \"not_implemented\")),\n    ))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id}\n///\n/// Delete a document by ID. Routes to all RF replicas of the owning shard.\nasync fn delete_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((uid, _id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let index_uid = uid;\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // TODO: Implement delete by ID\n    // 1. Hash the document ID to get shard\n    // 2. Find all RF replica nodes for that shard\n    // 3. Forward delete request to all replicas\n    // 4. Track quorum and return task UID\n\n    Err((\n        StatusCode::NOT_IMPLEMENTED,\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"Not implemented\", \"not_implemented\")),\n    ))\n}\n\n/// Get the primary key for an index by querying a healthy node.\nasync fn get_primary_key(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    index_uid: &str,\n) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Try each node until we find the index info\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(\n                topology,\n                &node.id,\n                \"GET\",\n                &format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index_uid),\n                None,\n                &[],\n            )\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\n                if let Some(pk) = response.body.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|p| p.as_str()) {\n                    return Ok(pk.to_string());\n                }\n                // Index exists but has no primary key set\n                return Err(ErrorResponse::primary_key_required(index_uid));\n            }\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 404 => {\n                // Index doesn't exist on this node, try another\n                continue;\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    // No node has the index\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index_uid))\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":16,"newStart":1,"newLines":281,"lines":["-use axum::extract::Path;","-use axum::{http::StatusCode, Json};","-use axum::{routing::any, Router};","+//! Select replica group: query_seq % RG\\n/// 2. Build covering set (one node per shard within selected group)\\n/// 3. Fan out query with showRankingScore=true\\n/// 4. Merge results globally by _rankingScore\\n/// 5. Apply offset/limit after merge\\n/// 6. Aggregate facets and estimatedTotalHits\\n/// 7. Strip _miroir_shard always, _rankingScore if not requested\\nasync fn search(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\\n    _headers: HeaderMap,\\n    Json(mut query): Json<Value>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\\n    let index_uid = uid;\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    // Get query parameters\\n    let offset = query\\n        .get(\\\"offset\\\")\\n        .and_then(|o| o.as_u64())\\n        .unwrap_or(0) as usize;\\n    let limit = query\\n        .get(\\\"limit\\\")\\n        .and_then(|l| l.as_u64())\\n        .unwrap_or(20) as usize;\\n\\n    let client_requested_score = query.get(\\\"showRankingScore\\\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()).unwrap_or(false);\\n\\n    // Select replica group for this query (round-robin)\\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\\n    let group_id = router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\\n\\n    let group = topology\\n        .group(group_id)\\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\\\"no replica groups available\\\"))?;\\n\\n    // Build covering set: one node per shard within the selected group\\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\\n    let covering_set = router::covering_set(\\n        shard_count,\\n        group,\\n        state.config.replication_factor as usize,\\n        query_seq,\\n    );\\n\\n    // Deduplicate nodes in covering set (a node may cover multiple shards)\\n    let unique_nodes: std::collections::HashSet<_> = covering_set.iter().collect();\\n    let node_count = unique_nodes.len();\\n\\n    // Prepare query for nodes - mark shards as failed\\n                for shard_id in shard_ids {\\n                    shard_responses.push(ShardResponse {\\n                        shard_id,\\n                        body: Value::Null,\\n                        success: false,\\n                    });\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // Merge results from all shards\\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::new(format!(\\\"merge failed: {}\\\", e), \\\"internal_error\\\"))?;\\n\\n    // Build response\\n    let mut response = serde_json::json!({\\n        \\\"hits\\\": merged.hits,\\n        \\\"processingTimeMs\\\": merged.processing_time_ms,\\n        \\\"query\\\": query.get(\\\"q\\\").unwrap_or(&Value::Null),\\n    });\\n\\n    // Add estimated total hits\\n    if let Some(total_hits) = query.get(\\\"showHitsPerTarget\\\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()) {\\n        response[\\\"estimatedTotalHits\\\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\\n    } else {\\n        response[\\\"estimatedTotalHits\\\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\\n    }\\n\\n    // Add facets if present\\n    if !merged.facets.as_object().map(|o| o.is_empty()).unwrap_or(true) {\\n        response[\\\"facetDistribution\\\"] = merged.facets;\\n    }\\n\\n    // Add limit and offset\\n    response[\\\"limit\\\"] = Value::Number(limit.into());\\n    response[\\\"offset\\\"] = Value::Number(offset.into());\\n\\n    Ok(Json(response))\\n}\\n\"}"}},"session_id":"4cc0ae3a-70ef-4686-b330-ae0535855799","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"bbe2643a-838b-424a-99bd-86c3567ffa7f"}

Search routes: POST /indexes/{uid}/search\n//!\n//! Implements the read path from plan §2:\n//! 1. Select replica group (query_seq % RG)\n//! 2. Build covering set within that group\n//! 3. Scatter query to all nodes in covering set\n//! 4. Merge results by _rankingScore\n//! 5. Strip _miroir_shard and _rankingScore as needed\n\nuse axum::extract::{Path, State};\nuse axum::http::HeaderMap;\nuse axum::Json;\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\nuse miroir_core::merger::{MergedResult, Merger, MergerImpl, ShardResponse};\nuse miroir_core::router;\nuse miroir_core::topology::NodeId;\n\npub fn router() -> Router {\n    Router::new().route(\"/:uid/search\", axum::routing::post(search))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/{uid}/search\n///\n/// Read path implementation per plan §2:\n/// 1. Select replica group: query_seq % RG\n/// 2. Build covering set (one node per shard within selected group)\n/// 3. Fan out query with showRankingScore=true\n/// 4. Merge results globally by _rankingScore\n/// 5. Apply offset/limit after merge\n/// 6. Aggregate facets and estimatedTotalHits\n/// 7. Strip _miroir_shard always, _rankingScore if not requested\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n    _headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(mut query): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let index_uid = uid;\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get query parameters\n    let offset = query\n        .get(\"offset\")\n        .and_then(|o| o.as_u64())\n        .unwrap_or(0) as usize;\n    let limit = query\n        .get(\"limit\")\n        .and_then(|l| l.as_u64())\n        .unwrap_or(20) as usize;\n\n    let client_requested_score = query.get(\"showRankingScore\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()).unwrap_or(false);\n\n    // Select replica group for this query (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"no replica groups available\"))?;\n\n    // Build covering set: one node per shard within the selected group\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering_set = router::covering_set(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n        query_seq,\n    );\n\n    // Deduplicate nodes in covering set (a node may cover multiple shards)\n    let unique_nodes: std::collections::HashSet<_> = covering_set.iter().collect();\n    let node_count = unique_nodes.len();\n\n    // Prepare query for nodes - always request ranking score for merging\n    query.insert(\"showRankingScore\".to_string(), Value::Bool(true));\n    query.insert(\"limit\".to_string(), Value::Number((offset + limit).into()));\n\n    let query_body = serde_json::to_vec(&query).unwrap();\n\n    // Send query to all nodes in covering set\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<ShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n\n    let responses = state\n        .client\n        .send_to_many(\n            &topology,\n            &covering_set,\n            \"POST\",\n            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index_uid),\n            Some(&query_body),\n            &[],\n        )\n        .await;\n\n    // Map node responses to shard responses\n    let mut node_shard_map: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for (shard_id, node_id) in covering_set.iter().enumerate() {\n        node_shard_map\n            .entry(node_id.clone())\n            .or_default()\n            .push(shard_id as u32);\n    }\n\n    for (node_idx, response_result) in responses.into_iter().enumerate() {\n        let node_id = covering_set.get(node_idx).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"unknown-{}\", node_idx))\n        });\n\n        let shard_ids = node_shard_map.get(&node_id).cloned().unwrap_or_default();\n\n        match response_result {\n            Ok(resp) if resp.status == 200 => {\n                for shard_id in shard_ids {\n                    shard_responses.push(ShardResponse {\n                        shard_id,\n                        body: resp.body.clone(),\n                        success: true,\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n            Ok(_) | Err(_) => {\n                // Node failed or returned error - mark shards as failed\n                for shard_id in shard_ids {\n                    shard_responses.push(ShardResponse {\n                        shard_id,\n                        body: Value::Null,\n                        success: false,\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Merge results from all shards\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::new(format!(\"merge failed: {}\", e), \"internal_error\"))?;\n\n    // Build response\n    let mut response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"hits\": merged.hits,\n        \"processingTimeMs\": merged.processing_time_ms,\n        \"query\": query.get(\"q\").unwrap_or(&Value::Null),\n    });\n\n    // Add estimated total hits\n    if let Some(total_hits) = query.get(\"showHitsPerTarget\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()) {\n        response[\"estimatedTotalHits\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\n    } else {\n        response[\"estimatedTotalHits\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\n    }\n\n    // Add facets if present\n    if !merged.facets.as_object().map(|o| o.is_empty()).unwrap_or(true) {\n        response[\"facetDistribution\"] = merged.facets;\n    }\n\n    // Add limit and offset\n    response[\"limit\"] = Value::Number(limit.into());\n    response[\"offset\"] = Value::Number(offset.into());\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4cc0ae3a-70ef-4686-b330-ae0535855799","uuid":"da9c0719-e4f9-4158-8a27-b9c735224795"}

Select replica group: query_seq % RG\n/// 2. Build covering set (one node per shard within selected group)\n/// 3. Fan out query with showRankingScore=true\n/// 4. Merge results globally by _rankingScore\n/// 5. Apply offset/limit after merge\n/// 6. Aggregate facets and estimatedTotalHits\n/// 7. Strip _miroir_shard always, _rankingScore if not requested\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n    _headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(mut query): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let index_uid = uid;\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get query parameters\n    let offset = query\n        .get(\"offset\")\n        .and_then(|o| o.as_u64())\n        .unwrap_or(0) as usize;\n    let limit = query\n        .get(\"limit\")\n        .and_then(|l| l.as_u64())\n        .unwrap_or(20) as usize;\n\n    let client_requested_score = query.get(\"showRankingScore\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()).unwrap_or(false);\n\n    // Select replica group for this query (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"no replica groups available\"))?;\n\n    // Build covering set: one node per shard within the selected group\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering_set = router::covering_set(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n        query_seq,\n    );\n\n    // Deduplicate nodes in covering set (a node may cover multiple shards)\n    let unique_nodes: std::collections::HashSet<_> = covering_set.iter().collect();\n    let node_count = unique_nodes.len();\n\n    // Prepare query for nodes - always request ranking score for merging\n    query.insert(\"showRankingScore\".to_string(), Value::Bool(true));\n    query.insert(\"limit\".to_string(), Value::Number((offset + limit).into()));\n\n    let query_body = serde_json::to_vec(&query).unwrap();\n\n    // Send query to all nodes in covering set\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<ShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n\n    let responses = state\n        .client\n        .send_to_many(\n            &topology,\n            &covering_set,\n            \"POST\",\n            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index_uid),\n            Some(&query_body),\n            &[],\n        )\n        .await;\n\n    // Map node responses to shard responses\n    let mut node_shard_map: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for (shard_id, node_id) in covering_set.iter().enumerate() {\n        node_shard_map\n            .entry(node_id.clone())\n            .or_default()\n            .push(shard_id as u32);\n    }\n\n    for (node_idx, response_result) in responses.into_iter().enumerate() {\n        let node_id = covering_set.get(node_idx).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            NodeId::new(format!(\"unknown-{}\", node_idx))\n        });\n\n        let shard_ids = node_shard_map.get(&node_id).cloned().unwrap_or_default();\n\n        match response_result {\n            Ok(resp) if resp.status == 200 => {\n                for shard_id in shard_ids {\n                    shard_responses.push(ShardResponse {\n                        shard_id,\n                        body: resp.body.clone(),\n                        success: true,\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n            Ok(_) | Err(_) => {\n                // Node failed or returned error - mark shards as failed\n                for shard_id in shard_ids {\n                    shard_responses.push(ShardResponse {\n                        shard_id,\n                        body: Value::Null,\n                        success: false,\n                    });\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Merge results from all shards\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::new(format!(\"merge failed: {}\", e), \"internal_error\"))?;\n\n    // Build response\n    let mut response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"hits\": merged.hits,\n        \"processingTimeMs\": merged.processing_time_ms,\n        \"query\": query.get(\"q\").unwrap_or(&Value::Null),\n    });\n\n    // Add estimated total hits\n    if let Some(total_hits) = query.get(\"showHitsPerTarget\").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()) {\n        response[\"estimatedTotalHits\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\n    } else {\n        response[\"estimatedTotalHits\"] = Value::Number(merged.total_hits.into());\n    }\n\n    // Add facets if present\n    if !merged.facets.as_object().map(|o| o.is_empty()).unwrap_or(true) {\n        response[\"facetDistribution\"] = merged.facets;\n    }\n\n    // Add limit and offset\n    response[\"limit\"] = Value::Number(limit.into());\n    response[\"offset\"] = Value::Number(offset.into());\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":11,"newStart":1,"newLines":169,"lines":["-use axum::extract::Path;","-use axum::{http::StatusCode, Json};","-use axum::{routing::any, Router};","+//! Index routes: POST /indexes, GET /indexes, DELETE /indexes/{uid}, etc.\\n//!\\n//! Implements index lifecycle per plan §3:\\n//! - Create: broadcast to all nodes, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\\n//! - Delete: broadcast to all nodes\\n//! - Settings: broadcast atomically\\n//! - Stats: aggregate numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution\\n\\nuse axum::extract::{Path, State};\\nuse axum::http::StatusCode;\\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\\nuse serde_json::Value;\\n\\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\\n\\npub fn router() -> Router {\\n    Router::new()\\n        .route(\\\"/\\\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid\\\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid/stats\\\", axum::routing::get(get_stats))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid/settings\\\", axum::routing::get(get_settings).patch(update_settings))\\n}\\n\\n/// GET /indexes\\n///\\n/// List all indexes. Returns the first healthy node's response.\\nasync fn list_indexes(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \\\"GET\\\", \\\"/indexes\\\", None, &[])\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\\n            }\\n            _ => continue,\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    Err((\\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\\\"No healthy nodes available\\\", \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n    ))\\n}\\n\\n/// POST /indexes\\n///\\n/// Create an index. Broadcasts to all nodes and injects _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes.\\nasync fn create_index(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Json(mut body): Json<Value>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    let uid = body\\n        .get(\\\"uid\\\")\\n        .and_then(|u| u.as_str())\\n        .ok_or_else(|| {\\n            (\\n                StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,\\n                Json(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\\\"missing 'uid' field\\\")),\\n            )\\n        })?;\\n\\n    // Extract primary key if present\\n    let primary_key = body.get(\\\"primaryKey\\\").and_then(|p| p.as_str());\\n\\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is in filterableAttributes\\n    let filterable_attrs = body\\n        .get(\\\"filterableAttributes\\\")\\n        .and_then(|a| a.as_array())\\n        .map(|a| a.clone())\\n        .unwrap_or_default();\\n\\n    let mut updated_attrs = filterable_attrs.clone();\\n    if !updated_attrs.iter().any(|a| a.as_str() == Some(\\\"_miroir_shard\\\")) {\\n        updated_attrs.push(Value::String(\\\"_miroir_shard\\\".to_string()));\\n    }\\n\\n    body[\\\"filterableAttributes\\\"] = Value::Array(updated_attrs);\\n\\n    let request_body = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap();\\n\\n    // Broadcast to all nodes\\n    let mut created_count = 0;\\n    let mut failed_nodes = Vec::new();\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(\\n                &topology,\\n                &node.id,\\n                \\\"POST\\\",\\n                \\\"/indexes\\\",\\n                Some(&request_body),\\n                &[],\\n            )\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 201 => {\\n                created_count += 1;\\n            }\\n            Ok(response) => {\\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\\\"{}: {}\\\", node.id.as_str(), response.status));\\n            }\\n            Err(e) => {\\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\\\"{}: {}\\\", node.id.as_str(), e));\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // Check if at least one node succeeded\\n    if created_count == 0 {\\n        return Err((\\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(format!(\\n                \\\"Failed to create index on any node: {}\\\",\\n                failed_nodes.join(\\\", \\\")\\n            ), \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    // Return success response (using first node's response structure)\\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\\n        \\\"uid\\\": (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let uid = body\n        .get(\"uid\")\n        .and_then(|u| u.as_str())\n        .ok_or_else(|| {\n .get(\"filterableAttributes\")\n        .and_then(|a| a.as_array())\n        .map(|a| a.clone())\n        .unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let mut updated_attrs = filterable_attrs.clone();\n    if Index routes: POST /indexes, GET /indexes, DELETE /indexes/{uid}, etc.\\n//!\\n//! Implements index lifecycle per plan §3:\\n//! - Create: broadcast to all nodes, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\\n//! - Delete: broadcast to all nodes\\n//! - Settings: broadcast atomically\\n//! - Stats: aggregate numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution\\n\\nuse axum::extract::{Path, State};\\nuse axum::http::StatusCode;\\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\\nuse serde_json::Value;\\n\\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\\nuse miroir_core::topology::NodeId;\\n\\npub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\\nwhere\\n    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\\n{\\n    Router::new()\\n        .route(\\\"/\\\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid\\\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid/stats\\\", axum::routing::get(get_stats))\\n        .route(\\\"/:uid/settings\\\", axum::routing::get(get_settings).patch(update_settings))\\n}\\n\\n/// GET /indexes\\n///\\n/// List all indexes. Returns the first healthy node's response.\\nasync fn list_indexes(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \\\"GET\\\", \\\"/indexes\\\", None, &[])\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\\n            }\\n            _ => continue,\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    Err((\\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\\\"No healthy nodes available\\\", \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n    ))\\n}\\n\\n/// POST /indexes\\n///\\n/// Create an index. Broadcasts to all nodes and injects _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes.\\nasync fn create_index(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Json(mut body): Json<Value>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    let uid = body\\n        .get(\\\"uid\\\")\\n        .and_then(|u| u.as_str())\\n        .ok_or_else(|| {\\n            (\\n                StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,\\n                Json(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\\\"missing 'uid' field\\\")),\\n            )\\n        })?;\\n\\n    // Extract primary key if present\\n    let primary_key = body.get(\\\"primaryKey\\\").and_then(|p| p.as_str());\\n\\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is in filterableAttributes\\n    let filterable_attrs = body\\n        .get(\\\"filterableAttributes\\\")\\n        .and_then(|a| a.as_array())\\n        .map(|a| a.clone())\\n        .unwrap_or_default();\\n\\n    let mut updated_attrs = filterable_attrs.clone();\\n    if !updated_attrs.iter().any(|a| a.as_str() == Some(\\\"_miroir_shard\\\")) {\\n        updated_attrs.push(Value::String(\\\"_miroir_shard\\\".to_string()));\\n    }\\n\\n    body[\\\"filterableAttributes\\\"] = Value::Array(updated_attrs);\\n\\n    let request_body = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap();\\n\\n    // Broadcast to all nodes\\n    let mut created_count = 0;\\n    let mut failed_nodes = Vec::new();\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(\\n                &topology,\\n                &node.id,\\n                \\\"POST\\\",\\n                \\\"/indexes\\\",\\n                Some(&request_body),\\n                &[],\\n            )\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 201 => {\\n                created_count += 1;\\n            }\\n            Ok(response) => {\\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\\\"{}: {}\\\", node.id.as_str(), response.status));\\n            }\\n            Err(e) => {\\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\\\"{}: {}\\\", node.id.as_str(), e));\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // Check if at least one node succeeded\\n    if created_count == 0 {\\n        return Err((\\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(format!(\\n                \\\"Failed to create index on any node: {}\\\",\\n                failed_nodes.join(\\\", \\\")\\n            ), \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    // Return success response (using first node's response structure)\\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\\n        \\\"uid\\\": uid,\\n        \\\"primaryKey\\\": primary_key,\\n        \\\"createdAt\\\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\\n        \\\"updatedAt\\\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\\n    });\\n\\n    Ok(Json(response))\\n}\\n\\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}\\n///\\n/// Get index metadata. Returns the first healthy node's response.\\nasync fn get_index(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \\\"GET\\\", &format!(\\\"/indexes/{}\\\", uid), None, &[])\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\\n            }\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 404 => {\\n                return Err((\\n                    StatusCode::NOT_FOUND,\\n                    Json(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&uid)),\\n                ));\\n            }\\n            _ => continue,\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    Err((\\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\\\"No healthy nodes available\\\", \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n    ))\\n}\\n\\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}\\n///\\n/// Delete an index. Broadcasts to all nodes.\\nasync fn delete_index(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    let mut deleted_count = 0;\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(\\n                &topology,\\n                &node.id,\\n                \\\"DELETE\\\",\\n                &format!(\\\"/indexes/{}\\\", uid),\\n                None,\\n                &[],\\n            )\\n            .await\\n        {\\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 202 || response.status == 204 => {\\n                deleted_count += 1;\\n            }\\n            _ => continue,\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    if deleted_count == 0 {\\n        return Err((\\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\\\"Failed to delete index on any node\\\", \\\"internal_error\\\")),\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\\n        \\\"uid\\\": uid,\\n        \\\"status\\\": \\\"succeeded\\\",\\n        \\\"type\\\": \\\"indexDeletion\\\",\\n        \\\"enqueuedAt\\\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\\n    });\\n\\n    Ok(Json(response))\\n}\\n\\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/stats\\n///\\n/// Get index stats. Aggregates numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution across all nodes.\\nasync fn get_stats(\\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\\n\\n    let mut total_docs = 0u64;\\n    let mut merged_field_distribution: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = serde_json::Map::new();\\n    let mut success_count = 0;\\n\\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\\n        match state\\n            .client\\n            .send_to_node(\\n                &topology,\\n                &node.id,\\n                \\\"GET\\\",\\n                &format!(\\\"/indexes/{}/stats\\\", uid),\\n                None,\\n                &[],\\n            )\\n Some(docs) = response.body.get(\\\"numberOfDocuments\\\").and_then(|d| d.as_u64()) {\\n                    total_docs += docs;\\n                }\\n\\n                // Merge fieldDistribution\\n                if let Some(fields) = response.body.get(\\\"fieldDistribution\\\").and_then(|f| f.as_object()) {\\n                    for (field, count) in fields {\\n                        let {"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"msg_20260509190658680d2edf35a14610","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"glm-4.7","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"call_cf08e7c3c19e494da333a92f","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-proxy/src/routes/indexes.rs","content":"//! Index routes: POST /indexes, GET /indexes, DELETE /indexes/{uid}, etc.\n//!\n//! Implements index lifecycle per plan §3:\n//! - Create: broadcast to all nodes, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n//! - Delete: broadcast to all nodes\n//! - Settings: broadcast atomically\n//! - Stats: aggregate numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution\n\nuse axum::extract::{Path, State};\nuse axum::http::StatusCode;\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\nuse miroir_core::topology::NodeId;\n\npub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\nwhere\n    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n{\n    Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\n        .route(\"/:uid\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\n        .route(\"/:uid/stats\", axum::routing::get(get_stats))\n        .route(\"/:uid/settings\", axum::routing::get(get_settings).patch(update_settings))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes\n///\n/// List all indexes. Returns the first healthy node's response.\nasync fn list_indexes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \"GET\", \"/indexes\", None, &[])\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err((\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy nodes available\", \"internal_error\")),\n    ))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes\n///\n/// Create an index. Broadcasts to all nodes and injects _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes.\nasync fn create_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Json(mut body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let uid = body\n        .get(\"uid\")\n        .and_then(|u| u.as_str())\n        .ok_or_else(|| {\n            (\n                StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,\n                Json(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"missing 'uid' field\")),\n            )\n        })?;\n\n    // Extract primary key if present\n    let primary_key = body.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|p| p.as_str());\n\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is in filterableAttributes\n    let filterable_attrs = body\n        .get(\"filterableAttributes\")\n        .and_then(|a| a.as_array())\n        .map(|a| a.clone())\n        .unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let mut updated_attrs = filterable_attrs.clone();\n    if !updated_attrs.iter().any(|a| a.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n        updated_attrs.push(Value::String(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string()));\n    }\n\n    body[\"filterableAttributes\"] = Value::Array(updated_attrs);\n\n    let request_body = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap();\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes\n    let mut created_count = 0;\n    let mut failed_nodes = Vec::new();\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(\n                &topology,\n                &node.id,\n                \"POST\",\n                \"/indexes\",\n                Some(&request_body),\n                &[],\n            )\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 201 => {\n                created_count += 1;\n            }\n            Ok(response) => {\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", node.id.as_str(), response.status));\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                failed_nodes.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", node.id.as_str(), e));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if at least one node succeeded\n    if created_count == 0 {\n        return Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(format!(\n                \"Failed to create index on any node: {}\",\n                failed_nodes.join(\", \")\n            ), \"internal_error\")),\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Return success response (using first node's response structure)\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": uid,\n        \"primaryKey\": primary_key,\n        \"createdAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        \"updatedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}\n///\n/// Get index metadata. Returns the first healthy node's response.\nasync fn get_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \"GET\", &format!(\"/indexes/{}\", uid), None, &[])\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\n            }\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 404 => {\n                return Err((\n                    StatusCode::NOT_FOUND,\n                    Json(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&uid)),\n                ));\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err((\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy nodes available\", \"internal_error\")),\n    ))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}\n///\n/// Delete an index. Broadcasts to all nodes.\nasync fn delete_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut deleted_count = 0;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(\n                &topology,\n                &node.id,\n                \"DELETE\",\n                &format!(\"/indexes/{}\", uid),\n                None,\n                &[],\n            )\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 202 || response.status == 204 => {\n                deleted_count += 1;\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    if deleted_count == 0 {\n        return Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"Failed to delete index on any node\", \"internal_error\")),\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": uid,\n        \"status\": \"succeeded\",\n        \"type\": \"indexDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/stats\n///\n/// Get index stats. Aggregates numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution across all nodes.\nasync fn get_stats(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n    let mut merged_field_distribution: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = serde_json::Map::new();\n d.as_u64()) {\n                    total_docs += docs;\n                }\n\n                // Merge fieldDistribution\n                if let Some(fields) = response.body.get(\"fieldDistribution\").and_then(|f| f.as_object()) {\n                    for (field, count) in fields {\n                        let count_val = count.as_u64().unwrap_or(0);\n                        *merged_field_distribution\n                            .entry(field.clone())\n                            .or_insert(Value::Number(0.into()))\n                            .as_number_mut()\n                            .unwrap()\n                            .as_u64_mut()\n                            .unwrap() += count_val;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    if success_count == 0 {\n        return Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy nodes available\", \"internal_error\")),\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"numberOfDocuments\": total_docs,\n        \"isIndexing\": false,\n        \"fieldDistribution\": merged_field_distribution,\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/settings\n///\n/// Get index settings. Broadcasts atomically to all nodes with rollback on failure.\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n                arr.push(Value::String(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let request_body = Returns the first healthy node's response.\nasync fn get_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(&topology, &node.id, \"GET\", &format!(\"/indexes/{}\", uid), None, &[])\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\n                return Ok(Json(response.body));\n            }\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 404 => {\n                return Err((\n                    StatusCode::NOT_FOUND,\n                    Json(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&uid)),\n                ));\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err((\n        StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n        Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy nodes available\", \"internal_error\")),\n    ))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}\n///\n/// Delete an index. Broadcasts to all nodes.\nasync fn delete_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut deleted_count = 0;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(\n                &topology,\n                &node.id,\n                \"DELETE\",\n                &format!(\"/indexes/{}\", uid),\n                None,\n                &[],\n            )\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 || response.status == 202 || response.status == 204 => {\n                deleted_count += 1;\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    if deleted_count == 0 {\n        return Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"Failed to delete index on any node\", \"internal_error\")),\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": uid,\n        \"status\": \"succeeded\",\n        \"type\": \"indexDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/stats\n///\n/// Get index stats. Aggregates numberOfDocuments and fieldDistribution across all nodes.\nasync fn get_stats(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n    let mut merged_field_distribution: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = serde_json::Map::new();\n    let mut success_count = 0;\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match state\n            .client\n            .send_to_node(\n                &topology,\n                &node.id,\n                \"GET\",\n                &format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", uid),\n                None,\n                &[],\n            )\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) if response.status == 200 => {\n                success_count += 1;\n\n                // Sum numberOfDocuments\n                if let Some(docs) = response.body.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|d| d.as_u64()) {\n                    total_docs += docs;\n                }\n\n                // Merge fieldDistribution\n                if let Some(fields) = response.body.get(\"fieldDistribution\").and_then(|f| f.as_object()) {\n                    for (field, count) in fields {\n                        let count_val = count.as_u64().unwrap_or(0);\n                        *merged_field_distribution\n                            .entry(field.clone())\n                            .or_insert(Value::Number(0.into()))\n                            .as_number_mut()\n                            .unwrap()\n                            .as_u64_mut()\n                            .unwrap() += count_val;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            _ => continue,\n        }\n    }\n\n    if success_count == 0 {\n        return Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy nodes available\", \"internal_error\")),\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"numberOfDocuments\": total_docs,\n        \"isIndexing\": false,\n        \"fieldDistribution\": merged_field_distribution,\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/{uid}/settings\n///\n/// Get index settings. Broadcasts atomically to all nodes with rollback on failure.\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is in filterableAttributes\n    let mut updated_body = Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n                arr.push(Value::String(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let request_body = serde_json::to_vec(&updated_body).unwrap();\n\n    // Sequential broadcast with rollback\n    let mut applied_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        match applied_nodes.push(node.id.as_str().to_string());\n            }\n            Ok(_) | Err(_) => {\n                // Rollback: revert settings on all previously applied nodes\n                for /_miroir/ready - readiness check\n//! - GET /_miroir/metrics - Prometheus metrics (auth-gated)\n\nuse axum::extract::State;\nuse axum::http::StatusCode;\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\n\npub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\nwhere\n    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n{\n    Router::new()\n        .route(\"/topology\", axum::routing::get(get_topology))\n        .route(\"/shards\", axum::routing::get(get_shards))\n        .route(\"/ready\", axum::routing::get(get_ready))\n        .route(\"/metrics\", axum::routing::get(get_metrics))\n}\n\n/// GET /_miroir/topology\n///\n/// Returns node list, health state, and shard assignments.\n/// Per plan §4 Admin API table.\nasync fn get_topology(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let health = state.get_node_health().await;\n    let assignments = state.get_shard_assignments().await;\n\n    let response = serde_json::json!({\n        \"nodes\": health,\n        \"shards\": assignments,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"shards\": state.config.shards,\n            \"replication_factor\": state.config.replication_factor,\n            \"replica_groups\": state.config.replica_groups,\n        }\n    });\n\n    Ok(Json(response))\n}\n\n/// GET /_miroir/shards\n///\n/// Returns shard → node mapping table.\n/// Per plan §4 Admin API table.\nasync fn get_shards(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let assignments = state.get_shard_assignments().await;\n\n    // Group by shard for easier reading\n    let mut by_shard: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = serde_json::Map::new();\n\n    for assignment in &assignments {\n        let shard_key = assignment.shard_id.to_string();\n        let group_key = format!(\"group_{}\", assignment.replica_group);\n\n        by_shard\n            .entry(shard_key)\n            .or_insert_with(|| serde_json::json!({}))\n            .as_object_mut()\n            .unwrap()\n            .insert(\n                group_key,\n                Value::Array(\n                    assignment\n                        .nodes\n                        .iter()\n                        .map(|n| Value::String(n.clone()))\n                        .collect(),\n                ),\n            );\n    }\n\n    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n        \"shards\": by_shard,\n        \"shard_count\": state.config.shards,\n    })))\n}\n\n/// GET /_miroir/ready\n///\n/// Readiness check for Kubernetes.\n/// Returns 200 when at least one replica group has healthy nodes.\nasync fn get_ready(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, (StatusCode, Json<ErrorResponse>)> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Check if at least one group has healthy nodes\n    let mut healthy_group_count = 0;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        let healthy_nodes = group.nodes().iter().filter(|node_id| {\n            topology\n                .node(node_id)\n                .map(|n| n.is_healthy())\n                .unwrap_or(false)\n        }).count();\n\n        if healthy_nodes > 0 {\n            healthy_group_count += 1;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if healthy_group_count > 0 {\n        Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n            \"status\": \"ready\",\n            \"healthy_groups\": healthy_group_count,\n            \"total_groups\": topology.replica_group_count(),\n        })))\n    } else {\n        Err((\n            StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n            Json(ErrorResponse::new(\"No healthy replica groups\", \"service_unavailable\")),\n        ))\n    }\n}\n\n/// GET /_miroir/metrics\n///\n/// Prometheus metrics endpoint (auth-gated mirror of :9090/metrics).\n/// Per plan §4 Admin API table and §10 http::StatusCode,\n    middleware::Next,\n    response::Response,\n};\n\nuse crate::error_response::ErrorResponse;\nuse crate::state::ProxyState;\n\n/// Token kind after classification.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]\npub enum TokenKind {\n    /// Client master key.\n    Master,\n    /// Admin API key.\n    Admin,\n    /// JWT token (Phase 5).\n    Jwt,\n    /// Search UI scoped key (Phase 5).\n    Scoped,\n}\n\n/// Auth context from request headers.\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct AuthContext {\n    /// Token kind.\n    pub token_kind: TokenKind,\n    /// Raw token value.\n    pub token: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Classify the token from Authorization header.\n/// Returns None if no valid Authorization header is present.\npub fn classify_token(headers: &http::HeaderMap) -> Option<AuthContext> {\n    let auth_header = headers.get(AUTHORIZATION)?.to_str().ok()?;\n    let token = auth_header.strip_prefix(\"Bearer \")?;\n\n    Some(AuthContext {\n        token_kind: TokenKind::Master, // Default to master, will be validated\n        token: Some(token.to_string()),\n    })\n}\n\n/// Middleware for authenticating client API requests with master key.\npub async fn require_master_key(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    mut req: Request,\n    next: Next,\n) -> Result<Response, Response> {\n    // Check Authorization header\n    let auth_header = req\n        .headers()\n        .get(AUTHORIZATION)\n        .and_then(|h| h.to_str().ok());\n\n    if let Some(auth_value) = auth_header {\n        if let Some(token) = auth_value.strip_prefix(\"Bearer \") {\n            if state.is_valid_master_key(token) {\n                return Ok(next.run(req).await);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Also check X-Meili-API-Key header (Meilisearch compatibility)\n    if let Some(api_key) = req\n        .headers()\n        .get(\"X-Meili-API-Key\")\n        .and_then(|h| h.to_str().ok())\n    {\n        if state.is_valid_master_key(api_key) {\n            return Ok(next.run(req).await);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Return 401 if no valid auth\n    let error = ErrorResponse::new(\n        \"Invalid API key. The provided API key is invalid.\",\n        \"invalid_api_key\",\n    );\n\n    Err((StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED, error.into_response()))\n}\n\n/// Middleware for authenticating admin API requests with admin key.\npub async fn require_admin_key(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    mut req: Request,\n    next: Next,\n) -> Result<Response, Response> {\n    // Check Authorization header\n    let auth_header = req\n        .headers()\n        .get(AUTHORIZATION)\n        .and_then(|h| h.to_str().ok());\n\n    if let Some(auth_value) = auth_header {\n        if let Some(token) = auth_value.strip_prefix(\"Bearer \") {\n            if state.is_valid_admin_key(token) {\n                return Ok(next.run(req).await);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Also check X-Admin-Key header (convenient for non-Bearer clients)\n    if let Some(admin_key) = req\n        .headers()\n        .get(\"X-Admin-Key\")\n        .and_then(|h| h.to_str().ok())\n    {\n        if state.is_valid_admin_key(admin_key) {\n            return Ok(next.run(req).await);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Return 401 if no valid auth\n    let error = ErrorResponse::new(\n        \"Invalid admin API key.\",\n        \"miroir_invalid_auth\",\n    );\n\n    Err((StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED, error.into_response()))\n}\n\n/// Optional authentication -
